title: anogeissus acuminata var. phillyreifolia
intro: Anogeissus acuminata var. phillyreifolia, also known as the 'Gambhar tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Combretaceae family and is native to India. The medicinal properties of Anogeissus acuminata var. phillyreifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties to be utilized, and its leaves, bark, and roots are used in various herbal preparations.
